gist.headline: Director's Cut: 60-Second Videos
gist.blurb: We fixed a bug in Nova Reel's multi-shot video generation and doubled the maximum duration while we were at it. You can now generate automated multi-shot videos up to a full minute long!
gist.summary: Fixed parameter routing for Nova Reel's multi-shot automated task type and increased the maximum video duration from 30 to 60 seconds.
gist.impact: Users can now successfully generate longer, multi-shot automated videos up to 60 seconds using the Nova Reel model.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about video generation (Nova Reel) and making it longer (60 seconds) / multi-shot. Visual symbols: film reels, director's clapperboard, video camera, film strips. Characters: Polly the bee acting as a movie director.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a classic movie clapperboard next to a glowing retro film projector. Long strips of film reel spool out around her, glowing with soft pastel colors. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
